name: Routefusion
description: Global payments API for fintechs with cross-border transfers, FX, and multi-rail stablecoin support.

seo.title: Routefusion — Payment Gateway / PSP

when_to_use: Cross-border transfers via bank rails and stablecoin routes

review.best_for: Fintechs and platforms needing global cross-border transfers with FX and stablecoin rails
